## Source: ossf-package-analysis (f84ce8437ca7734a032fd542e9296762ced4f17846d9f74980c144260a948d9e)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-features-groups' @ 1.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
